heading: Gross income
label: 872 Gross income

children.text: gross income which is derived from sources within the United States and which is not effectively connected with the conduct of a trade or business within the United States, and
gross income which is effectively connected with the conduct of a trade or business within the United States.

children.heading: Ships operated by certain nonresidents
children.label: 1 Ships operated by certain nonresidents
children.text: Gross income derived by an individual resident of a foreign country from the international operation of a ship or ships if such foreign country grants an equivalent exemption to individual residents of the United States.

children.heading: Aircraft operated by certain nonresidents
children.label: 2 Aircraft operated by certain nonresidents
children.text: Gross income derived by an individual resident of a foreign country from the international operation of aircraft if such foreign country grants an equivalent exemption to individual residents of the United States.

children.heading: Compensation of participants in certain exchange or training programs
children.label: 3 Compensation of participants in certain exchange or training programs
A
children.text: a nonresident alien individual, foreign partnership, or foreign corporation, or

children.label: B
children.text: an office or place of business maintained in a foreign country or in a possession of the United States by a domestic corporation, a domestic partnership, or an individual who is a citizen or resident of the United States.

children.heading: Certain bond income of residents of the Ryukyu Islands or the Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands
children.label: 4 Certain bond income of residents of the Ryukyu Islands or the Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands
children.text: Income derived by a nonresident alien individual from a series E or series H United States savings bond, if such individual acquired such bond while a resident of the Ryukyu Islands or the Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands.

children.heading: Income derived from wagering transactions in certain parimutuel pools
children.label: 5 Income derived from wagering transactions in certain parimutuel pools
children.text: Gross income derived by a nonresident alien individual from a legal wagering transaction initiated outside the United States in a parimutuel pool with respect to a live horse race or dog race in the United States.

children.heading: Certain rental income
children.label: 6 Certain rental income
children.text: Income to which paragraphs (1) and (2) apply shall include income which is derived from the rental on a full or bareboat basis of a ship or ships or aircraft, as the case may be.

children.heading: Application to different types of transportation
children.label: 7 Application to different types of transportation
children.text: The Secretary may provide that this subsection be applied separately with respect to income from different types of transportation.

children.heading: Treatment of possessions
children.label: 8 Treatment of possessions
children.text: To the extent provided in regulations, a possession of the United States shall be treated as a foreign country for purposes of this subsection.
